size index = 100 x observed / expected; expected from a reference line of FIXED, STRUCTURE-SPECIFIC slope (log-log vs body weight) through the basal-Insectivora centroid: total neocortex 0.67, white matter 0.86, grey matter 0.63, lamina 1 0.65, laminae 2-6 0.62.
Note: Frahm & Stephan 1982 Methods. NOT recomputed in the snapshot-only R script (needs body weights, external to this volumes table); recompute downstream with body weights from Stephan et al. 1981. The printed Table 1 of this paper gives the total-neocortex size index for validation.
